eligious student); if Jupiter, to that of the family deity, a friend
or a preceptor or to the sin caused by destroying a fruit-laden
tree; if Venus, to that of a chaste woman, cattle or a Yaksi or to
the sin caused by the destruction of flower-laden trees; if Saturn,
to that of the God of Death, ghosts or goblins or as a result of
cutting down the sacred Asvattha (peepul) tree; if Rahu be in

188 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
the 5th house or conjoined with its lord, it is due to the curse of
serpents; if Ketu, it is due to the curse of a Brahmin; and in the
case of Gulika (or Mandi), it is due to the curse of discamate
spirits. If Venus and the Moon in conjunction with Mandi be
in the 5th house, the cause is the murder of a cow or woman;
and if Jupiter or Ketu be there along with Mandi, it is due to the
murder of a Brahmin. These troubles can be warded olf or
minimized by performing appropriate propitiatory ceremonies.
There is nothing unscientific in this, for, if you oftend a
